subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath made mention of His name before the One Who is remembered, that he may render thanks unto God Who hath strengthened him and guided him unto His path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن ذکر اسمه لدی المذکور لیشکر الله الذی ایده و هداه الی صراطه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat]
